WITH first_visits AS (
    SELECT "visitorId", MIN("date") AS first_visit_date
    FROM (
        SELECT "visitorId", "date" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
        UNION ALL
        SELECT "visitorId", "date" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160802
        UNION ALL
        SELECT "visitorId", "date" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160803
    )
    GROUP BY "visitorId"
),
mobile_transactions AS (
    SELECT "visitorId", MIN("date") AS first_mobile_transaction_date
    FROM (
        SELECT "visitorId", "date", "device":"deviceCategory" AS device_category FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
        UNION ALL
        SELECT "visitorId", "date", "device":"deviceCategory" AS device_category FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160802
        UNION ALL
        SELECT "visitorId", "date", "device":"deviceCategory" AS device_category FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160803
    )
    WHERE device_category = 'mobile'
    GROUP BY "visitorId"
)
SELECT mt."visitorId"
FROM first_visits fv
JOIN mobile_transactions mt ON fv."visitorId" = mt."visitorId"
WHERE mt.first_mobile_transaction_date > fv.first_visit_date
", is_save=True, save_path="/workspace/result.csv")
